column1: Hey Jaida, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Okay dope. Which destination were we interested in?
or if there's a cheaper option if we leave the 15th or something then we could do that
we are interested in punta cana
Yea I'll be in Punta Cana too actually!
How many ppl in your group?
Loved “Yea I'll be in Punta Cana too actually!”
we're not completely sure on exactly how many but it's between 12-15
Yea that's solid. You all from the same school? I'll hook it up with a good group rate
we just wanted to know our options and what the best deals are, but we are for sure going to punta
yes! all from university of kentucky
Oh bet! We've had a few groups from your school come recently
Heard yall know how to party lol
Yea gonna put all the options together for you right now. How soon were you lookin to get started?
Loved “Heard yall know how to party lol”
we sure do know how to party
we want to get something booked
Bet yea let's run it! I'll hook it up for you. I'll add the payment plan too which lets yall reserve with just a deposit then worry about the rest of the payments later
Cool if I send most of the info through email? It's a little long for text
just sent that over lmk if it came through
I can hook it up with a discount on the prices you see there too. I'll personally be staying at the occidental punta cana. for that 4 night package 16-20 I can get the price down to $599
sounds great! i got the email. would we need to put a deposit in by nov 3 to get the deal?
yea its honestly a deal from october that I'm kinda extending to you lol
you think you'd be able to get ppl on board by then? or will it be tough
how much is that deposit? and do you also book the flights as well
the deposit is 200 each person. everyone makes their own payments on their own slots. and then that reserves it all and locks in the price for them!
we can do flights yup, but its honestly cheaper to get separately on your own. depends if youd rather the convenience of having it all in one, or save a little by finding one
I dont mind just finding on online for you and sending the link so you can all go get it. you'll save that way
yeah that would be great, we can look separately too and book it
okay cool. which airport we gonna fly out of? ill see what I can find rn
since we do have a big group and it is last min, we would definitely put a deposit in on nov 3 to give everyone the weekend
yea all good! that works. I'll set up the reservation for Nov 3 and send it over tomorrow so people can start slotting in. thyell have through the whole day Monday to get settled
finding a few flight options rn gimme like 5 more mins, got a couple
okay so heres what I was able to find. I did a few diff day variations too like the 15th and the 14th but all kinda the same price as the 16-20. and all airports are kinda in the same ballpark
theres a cheaper option for here ^ but times werent super ideal
hello! do you have the reservation?
hey just sent over an email with step by step on how to get on and situated
here's the link here too so you have it https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/package/ISJTTGOL29
No prob! Lmk if you need me to adjust anything
Added the booze cruise in there too
would you suggest adding a party package?

hey morning. In a short answer, yes. But it really depends on how much people are looking to spend. We have a bundle running right now at $200 for 3 nights out. Comes with transportation, express entry, cover charge, and open bar at our off resort nightclub events
okay! if we don't get the party package what all would it come with? like open bars or something at the resort?

Yea without the party pass you can still go to all of our events on the resort. We host a pool party, a beach party, and there's one nightclub on the resort that we'll bring our DJs into atleast once through the week
The off resort party pass is definitely worth it in my opinion. It makes the trip a lot better
okay! sounds good thank you for the info

You do have time to decide tho. each person can add the party pass individually on their accounts any time. When you log in you'll see an add on option on your account. You have up to 2 days before the trip to add those in
That bundle deal is will only be avail for a limited time. But each person will be able to add events one by one on their own
Loved “That bundle deal is will only be avail for a limited time. But each person will be able to add events one by one on their own”
we get open bars on the resort correct?
Yup! That's included in what you have right now
Plenty of bars all around the resort you can stop at whenever and grab a drink for free
if some people put the deposit in tn but some people wait a little bit could we still have the rooms?
or does everyone need to put in the deposit tn
Yea roughly how many ppl are good to deposit? I'll put a note in to the ops team about jt
So about half, yea that's fine let's get it in I'll be able to maneuver
like they want to wait until they have a little more money(not long) but i didn't know how that works
Is there a reason why the others want to wait?
i can try and get them to do it
Ideally if they can that would be good. Like if someone absolutely doesn't have the money and needs an arrangement I'm down to adjust for them
hey!! so one more girl is going to put her info in. some girls dropped out... sorry so last min but is it possible to do 2 3 person rooms or 1 3 person and 1 4 person???
Hey all good, how many ppl total? 6 or 7
one girl might need a couple days for the deposit but that is final number
the room with me anna and asia is a 3 and the one with kenzie and ryan is 4
Got you. Everyone else just bailed last min?
yes.. it was a whole group that wanted to go but they decided they wanted to go somewhere else
No it's all good! You're gonna have a great time either way
oh i know we're so excited
Where do the other friends plan on going?
somewhere in florida, i'm not really close w them, it was other girls in the groups friends
Ahh, they can literally go to Florida any time lol
do i need to do anything for the reservation to go down to 7 people or am i good
I'm gonna edit it for you rn!
is the other room supposed to be a 3 person? we were scared we're going to have to for a 4th person that's not there
hey! so we're doing 6 of us... so 2 three person rooms
all of us have paid the first installment but the ones who are down are the only ones going. if you could change the 4 person the a 3 that would be amazing
yea lets do it, 2 rooms of 3
hi! after we pay the last payment is there anything we need to do? will we know what room number we are.. how does that work
Jaida! whats good hope thanksgiving was dope

so once you make the final payment, next you'll want to add your flight info onto your accounts so that our operations team can get your transportation scheduled for when you land. shortly after all of that is all set, youll get a series of emails with full info about your trip - how to find the transportation service, vouchers, party pass info, deeper destination info, etc. your physical room number is assigned when you get to the resort to check in. we have our onsite staff team there to help you get situated and checked in. and theyre there 24/7 to answer any questions you have and help you navigate around
amazing you're the best thank you!
is it free transportation to the resort?
yea! its included in the package you have
yea we got you covered lol
heyy when you got a min if you could tell Ryan to toss in his flight info, so we can finalize transfers
of course!!! i'll tell her to do that

hey!! i was just wondering if we have the booze cruise included in our package? and also what are the differences between the party packages? is the party package imagine all the different clubs and parties listed?

yo! yea you have the booze cruise included. the party package comes with round trip coach bus transportation, express entry, cover charge, and open bar at our off-resort nightclub hosted events. those venues are Imagine Cave, Coco Bongo, and Maroca Nightclub
each venue has a designated night of the week where everyone goes. pretty lit
heyy Jaida did Mackenzie still plan on going to Coco bongo?
yes! i think we all are. i'm going to add mine on friday but did she not pay for it?
i didn't get the coco bongo package yet but my thing says this
does that mean i already have it?
it says it's included in the package
that i have. is that correct? or do i need to get the coco bongo package

hotel 4 nights stay (check in 03/16/2026, checkout 03/20/2026) All Meals and Drinks at the Hotel* Best Price Guarantee 24/7 Support Staff On-Location Spring Break Hosts All U.S. Government Issued Taxes and Fees Round Trip Airport/Hotel/Airport Transfers Punta Cana Punta Cana Party Package - Coco Bongo Discounted Punta Cana Booze Cruise
hey yes you have coco bongo on your package! just looked
and the booze cruise as well
awesome!!! did it come with it? because i never paid for it 🤣🤣
lol the booze cruise came with it yea I hooked it up
did you put in coco bongo too?
wait now it's not saying it on a different thing
i for sure have it in my account?
but it has it on the group page
yea so my bad, it looks like Mackenzie, Ryan, Mackenzie M and Anna are the only ones that added coco bongo. but I added the booze cruise for everyone
also, kenzie was wondering if we need to add a card onto our hotel room in case anything happens
Yea one person has to put a card down
yo Jaida! we need Kenz to pay off her balance for coco bongo within the next 2 hours so we can finalize her account
do we have to print out the vouchers and the eticket emigration, or can we just have it on our phone
hey, you can have it on the phone thats fine just screenshot everything
Loved “hey, you can have it on the phone thats fine just screenshot everything”
HEYY SPIFFYYY!!! we're so grateful you planned all of this, we're on the way to nashville right now to fly out tmw morning!! if you're at occidental we would LOVE to meet you in person!!
Jaida whats gooood yea I'm here!
thank you!! we'll see you there
its been so lit lol. y'all are gonna love it
hey, our flight got cancelled from nashville to miami at 5am. i'm not sure what we're doing right now but i'm just keeping you in the loop
Ahh damn, okay. Keep me posted
our plane is stuck in texas and can't get it here.
they rescheduled it to tuesday but we're trying to fly out tmw
is there anyway you can help us? we don't know what to do

I would try using the airline's chat feature to see if there are any other ways you can reroute to get to PUJ tomorrow. Maybe there's a different major hub that will work as a stop point like ATL, or CLT
You can also look into flying into Santo Domingo, and we can help you arrange a ride to get here to Punta Cana
okay thank you, we will look
good morning! our original flight got scheduled for tmw but we went to the airport either way and got a ticket that lands in punta cana at 3:36 today
just making sure it's in yalls system
hey good morning. glad you got a new flight. can you lmk the deeper flight details. flight #, times, etc
so.... we might not make our connection flight now but i will send you the details
flight #1693 from bna to clt 9:41-12:11 flight #3319 from clt to puj 12:11-3:36pm arrival in punta
since the first flight keeps getting delayed i don't think we will make out connection
so now we'll be there in the morning
i'll send you flight info in a minute
we might be getting there tn now
we need to get to charlotte first before i know anything more
flight #3319 and the eta is 5:37 pm today
is there any way you can grab us 6 tickets for the pearl beach club for tonight? we won't be there to pick them up
Yea I got you. I'm gonna send you Alberto's number he's in charge of tickets
So he can set them aside
He's gonna meet you on the resort at 9
Here's his number, text him later on after you get here +1 (809) 676-9978 Alberto Tell him you're one of Spiffy's groups looking to go to Pearl
Hey did you make it in
how we livin hows it going
we're heading to the beach soon
we want to meet you dude
just left the beach. y'all comin to Imagine tonight?
nooo we're going to Coco bongo tomorrow night
thats right. lmk when y'all off the beach and around. I'll be chillin around the lobby later on
what time do we have to be in the lobby for coco bongo?
it doesn't matter what time before then?
I would slide to the lobby, grab a drink, and then you'll hear / see the Go Blue on site staff loading buses
Yo Jada I'm in the lobby gonna be headed out in a couple hrs
wait we might come over there
we're going to the beach soon
me and asia are almost in the lobby
Word I'll be back there in 1 min
